signal_objectives: rank continuations by repaired packet count
cluster first failures by CRT-locked residue class
identify whether +50 steps escape a stable obstruction menu
notes: This profile is tuned for a single high-VRAM Linux H100 instance on Brev.
It pushes the p848 ladder sweep wider than the 4090 profile while keeping the same artifact contract.
The goal is still frontier compression and structural packet discovery, not theorem claiming.
